_comment: FEMA NFHL Flood Hazard Zones (Layer 28 / S_FLD_HAZ_AR) area-weighted aggregate, verified live 2026-05-16. v1 fixture covers Lee County only — live mode (REFINERY_SOURCE=live) hits FEMA for all 6 SWFL counties. The area_total values are in square decimal degrees (WGS84, EPSG:4326), not projected meters; only ratios are meaningful.
